title: 10 Pcs Stainless Steel 1.8 inch Pad Eye Plate U Hooks + 10pcs Stainless Steel Snap Hook, Marine Hardware Staple Hook Loop with Screws, Plastic Expansion Pipe
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ✅【PACKAGE INCLUDED】 10pcs pad eye plate U hooks + 10pcs stainless steel snap hook + 20pcs screws + 20pcs plastic expansion pipe . Enough to meet your needs
✅【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL】Pad eye and snap hook are made of stainless steel, smooth surface without burrs,corrosion resistant, durable.
✅【LOAD BEARING】 Each pad eye maximum load:0.3 ton. Each snap hook maximum load:1 ton. Size as picture show.
✅【EASY TO INSTALL】Suitable for installation in wood ceilings, cement ceilings, brick walls, ceramic tile walls.

✅【WIDE APPLICATION】Our Pad Eye perfect for various kinds of buckles, quick links and links, Mainly used for ceiling & wall mount hanging hardware fitting, sling ropes, wire ropes, chains, also used in small yachts and boats, indoor or outdoor installation.
